data.title: Understanding the Role of Public and Private Keys in Digital Transactions
data.description: Crypto KOL 陈剑Jason posted on X. In a digital transaction scenario, the public key is akin to a phone number displayed in a lost and found notice, pointing to wallet assets visible to the public key owner. The private key, comparable to the owner's ID number, is required to initiate a signature on the public key, enabling the completion of the call process. The individual who finds the wallet acts as a node, verifying the correctness of the private key signature and facilitating the wallet transfer. Once the transaction is packaged, the owner retrieves a 100-unit reward from the wallet, which serves as Gas for the node.

data.title: SEC Develops Crypto Asset Taxonomy Guidance Framework
data.description: The SEC's Division of Corporation Finance is working on establishing a guidance framework for crypto asset taxonomy. According to NS3.AI, Director John Moloney confirmed this initiative on February 13, 2026, after presentations at the Securities Regulation Institute. This move highlights the SEC's continued efforts to clarify regulatory classifications for cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Zhu Su: Cryptocurrencies may outperform the seven major US tech stocks in the next few years.
data.description: Zhu Su wrote on the X platform that cryptocurrencies may significantly outperform the US tech giants (Mag7) in the next few years because it is the only vertical sector in Western technology that has a moat against China.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Expected to Outperform Major U.S. Stocks in Coming Years
data.description: On February 14, Zhu Su, co-founder of Three Arrows Capital, expressed his views on the future performance of cryptocurrencies. According to BlockBeats, Zhu Su stated that cryptocurrencies are likely to significantly outperform the seven major U.S. stocks, known as Mag7, in the coming years.

data.title: UK Prime Minister Seeks Closer Ties with EU Post-Brexit
data.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has stated that Britain has evolved since the Brexit vote and expressed his intention to strengthen the country's relationship with the European Union. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Starmer's commitment to fostering a more collaborative partnership with the EU. Starmer's remarks reflect a shift in the UK's approach to its European neighbors, aiming to enhance cooperation and address shared challenges. This move comes as the UK navigates its post-Brexit landscape, seeking to redefine its role on the international stage.

data.title: MSTR's Market Cycle: Analyzing Recent Trends
data.description: Crypto KOL Ted posted on X about the recent performance of MicroStrategy's stock, $MSTR. He noted that during the last market cycle, $MSTR reached its lowest point after 65 weeks, coinciding with its weekly Relative Strength Index (RSI) falling below 30. Currently, $MSTR is in its 66th week, and its RSI dropped below 30 last week. This raises the question of whether $MSTR has reached its bottom for the current cycle.

data.title: AI predicts XRP price for March 1, 2026
data.description:

Notably, the cryptocurrency has struggled in recent weeks after being impacted by the widespread market sell-off led by Bitcoin (BTC). To this end, the asset continues to trade below the $1.50 level

data.title: Solana Company Stock Surges After Launching Institutional SOL Borrowing Program
data.description:
Shares of Solana Company (NASDAQ: HSDT) climbed roughly 17% on February 13, 2026, after the firm introduced a new institutional borrowing framework tied to natively staked SOL. The stock rebounded toward the $2. 30 level after touching an all-time low near $1. 80 earlier in the week
source: https://www.ethnews.com/solana-company-stock-surges-after-launching-institutional-sol-borrowing-program/

data.title: End of Free-for-All Era for Weight-Loss Copycats Signals Industry Shift
data.description:
The era of unregulated weight-loss copycat products is coming to an end, signaling a shift in the industry. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X that the market for weight-loss solutions, which has seen a proliferation of imitation products, is undergoing significant changes. As regulatory scrutiny increases, companies are expected to adapt by exploring new avenues for growth and innovation.

The weight-loss industry has been characterized by a surge in products mimicking popular solutions, often without substantial scientific backing. This trend is likely to evolve as companies face pressure to comply with stricter regulations and consumer demand for effective and safe options.

Industry experts suggest that the focus may shift towards developing products with proven efficacy and safety profiles, potentially leading to collaborations with healthcare professionals and researchers. This transition could foster a more sustainable and credible market, benefiting consumers seeking reliable weight-loss solutions.

As the landscape changes, companies that can innovate and differentiate themselves from the competition are expected to thrive. The emphasis on quality and transparency may redefine the industry, offering new opportunities for growth and development.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | U.S. Criticism of Europe Reflects Concern, Says Secretary of State Rubio
data.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio emphasized the importance of European survival during a conversation with Bloomberg News Editor-in-Chief John Micklethwait. Bloomberg posted on X that Rubio explained the U.S. criticism of Europe is indicative of the Trump administration's concern for its allies. Rubio's remarks highlight the administration's commitment to maintaining strong relationships with European nations, despite recent tensions. The Secretary of State underscored the significance of collaboration and support among allies to ensure stability and prosperity in the region.

data.title: X Product Lead Expresses Optimism for Crypto Growth
data.description: Crypto KOL Satoshi Flipper posted on X that Nikita Bier, X Product Lead and Solana Ecosystem Advisor, expressed his genuine hope for the proliferation of cryptocurrency. Bier's statement reflects a positive outlook on the future of digital currencies and their potential impact on the global financial ecosystem. His role as an advisor in the Solana ecosystem further underscores his commitment to advancing blockchain technology and fostering innovation within the crypto space. Bier's comments come at a time when the industry is witnessing significant developments and growing interest from both institutional and retail investors. The expansion of crypto is seen as a pivotal factor in shaping the future of financial transactions and digital asset management.
